requirement: [Memory Deallocation] Return freed memory blocks to the free pool within 1ms

test_cases.description: Verify that memory blocks are returned to the free pool within 1ms
steps: Measure the time taken to return memory blocks to the free pool
test_cases.expected_result: Memory blocks are returned to the free pool within 1ms

test_cases.description: Verify behavior when trying to deallocate memory from an empty pool
test_cases.expected_result: Proper error handling or behavior when trying to deallocate from an empty pool

test_cases.description: Evaluate the performance of memory deallocation process
preconditions: Memory pool has varying load levels
steps: Deallocate memory blocks under different load levels
Measure and analyze the time taken for deallocation
test_cases.expected_result: Memory deallocation performance meets specified requirements

test_cases.description: Verify memory deallocation process in the overall system integration
steps: Integrate memory deallocation process with the system
test_cases.expected_result: Memory deallocation does not adversely affect system functionality

preconditions: Multiple threads or processes performing memory deallocation
steps: Initiate multiple concurrent memory deallocation operations
Monitor for any conflicts or race conditions
test_cases.expected_result: Memory deallocation operations are handled correctly under concurrent scenarios
